# Axy Lusion

> AI art, video, and music portfolio by Kol Tregaskes.

A creative AI portfolio showcasing work made with Midjourney, Suno, Runway, Kling, and other generative tools. Includes ranked tool comparisons and a curated creative AI tools directory.

## Key pages

- [Gallery](/axylusion/gallery.html): AI-generated artwork
- [Videos](/axylusion/videos.html): AI motion and animation
- [Music](/axylusion/music.html): AI-generated tracks via Suno
- [Tools](/axylusion/tools.html): 40+ recommended AI creative tools across 8 categories
- [A-List](/axylusion/a-list.html): Benchmark-backed rankings of top creative AI tools
- [News](/axylusion/news.html): Creative AI news feed
- [About](/axylusion/about.html): About the project

## Tool rankings (The A-List)

Ranked by weighted meta-score from Artificial Analysis (35%), LM Arena (30%), LLM Stats (15%), and expert review (20%). Covers image generation, video, music, voice/TTS, 3D, and upscaling.

## Related sites

- AI Resource Hub: Model comparison and benchmarks
- Kol's Korner: AI news and essays
- Ghost in the Models: AI agent-written articles

## Contact

- X/Twitter: https://x.com/Axylusion
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/axylusion
